‚áß‚åòP, F1 Show Command Palette
‚åòP Quick Open, Go to File‚Ä¶

‚áß‚åòN New window/instance
‚åòW Close window/instance
‚åò, User Settings
‚åòK ‚åòS Keyboard Shortcuts

‚åòX Cut line (empty selection)
‚åòC Copy line (empty selection)
‚å•‚Üì / ‚å•‚Üë Move line down/up
‚áß‚å•‚Üì / ‚áß‚å•‚Üë Copy line down/up
‚áß‚åòK Delete line
‚åòEnter / ‚áß‚åòEnter Insert line below/above
‚áß‚åò\ Jump to matching bracket
‚åò] / ‚åò[ Indent/outdent line
Home / End Go to beginning/end of line
‚åò‚Üë / ‚åò‚Üì Go to beginning/end of file
‚åÉPgUp / ‚åÉPgDn Scroll line up/down
‚åòPgUp /‚åòPgDn Scroll page up/down
‚å•‚åò[ / ‚å•‚åò] Fold/unfold region
‚åòK ‚åò[ / ‚åòK ‚åò] Fold/unfold all subregions
‚åòK ‚åò0 / ‚åòK ‚åòJ Fold/unfold all regions
‚åòK ‚åòC Add line comment
‚åòK ‚åòU Remove line comment
‚åò/ Toggle line comment
‚áß‚å•A Toggle block comment
‚å•Z Toggle word wrap

‚åòF Find
‚å•‚åòF Replace
‚åòG / ‚áß‚åòG Find next/previous
‚å•Enter Select all occurrences of Find match
‚åòD Add selection to next Find match
‚åòK ‚åòD Move last selection to next Find match

‚åÉSpace, ‚åòI Trigger suggestion
‚áß‚åòSpace Trigger parameter hints
‚áß‚å•F Format document
‚åòK ‚åòF Format selection
F12 Go to Definition
‚å•F12 Peek Definition
‚åòK F12 Open Definition to the side
‚åò. Quick Fix
‚áßF12 Show References
F2 Rename Symbol
‚åòK ‚åòX Trim trailing whitespace
‚åòK M Change file language

‚åòT Show all Symbols
‚åÉG Go to Line...
‚åòP Go to File...
‚áß‚åòO Go to Symbol...
‚áß‚åòM Show Problems panel
F8 / ‚áßF8 Go to next/previous error or warning
‚åÉ‚áßTab Navigate editor group history
‚åÉ- / ‚åÉ‚áß- Go back/forward
‚åÉ‚áßM Toggle Tab moves focus

‚áß‚åòT Reopen closed editor
‚åòK Enter Keep preview mode editor open
‚åÉTab / ‚åÉ‚áßTab Open next / previous
‚åòK P Copy path of active file
‚åòK R Reveal active file in Finder
‚åòK O Show active file in new window/instance

‚åÉ‚åòF Toggle full screen
‚å•‚åò0 Toggle editor layout (horizontal/vertical)
‚åò= / ‚áß‚åò- Zoom in/out
‚åòB Toggle Sidebar visibility
‚áß‚åòE Show Explorer / Toggle focus
‚áß‚åòF Show Search
‚åÉ‚áßG Show Source Control
‚áß‚åòD Show Debug
‚áß‚åòX Show Extensions
‚áß‚åòH Replace in files
‚áß‚åòJ Toggle Search details
‚áß‚åòU Show Output panel

‚åòK V Open Markdown preview to the side
‚åòK Z Zen Mode (Esc Esc to exit)

F9 Toggle breakpoint
